landingSubtitle: Choose Finger Spelling or Word Detection, then continue through units, chapters, lessons, practice, and quizzes in order.
landingHeroAlt: Live hand tracking preview for Khmer sign learning
landingFingerSpellingDesc: Learn each Khmer character from sample images and real-time keypoint correction.
landingWordDetectionDesc: Start from 20 word classes with video samples and live signing probability.
fsHomeSubtitle: Learn Khmer letters with hand signs
fsTrackTitle: Learn Khmer characters step by step
fsTrackSummaryDescription: Sample image, hand keypoints, live matching, and probability correction.
fsTrackQuizDescription: Exercise and quiz to track learner progress after all chapters.
fsSampleCaption: Sample image for the hand sign
fsCameraCaption: Live learner camera for comparing your hand sign
fsNoHandDetected: No hand detected in the camera. Keep your hand clearly visible.
fsProgressSyncFailed: Could not save lesson progress. Please try again.
fsCameraDenied: Could not open the camera. Please allow camera access in your browser.
fsCameraUnavailable: Camera is not available on this device.
fsStabilityTimeout: Please hold your hand steady again
fsCorrectionPassed: Correct. Your thumb placement is strong. Raise the index finger slightly for a cleaner shape.
fsCorrectionAlmost: Almost there. Adjust your hand angle and keep the palm closer to the sample.
fsDefaultPracticeTip: Use your right hand for better accuracy. Match your hand shape to the sample, keep fingers visible, and compare it with the camera preview.
fsExerciseHint: Chapter exercises unlock after you complete every lesson in a chapter.
fsExerciseLockedHint: Complete all lessons in this chapter first
adminTargetAnswerPlaceholder: What is the exact text the user should type?
adminTextAnswerNote: Note: System will compare user input with this value for scoring.
adminValidationCorrectAnswer: Validation: A correct answer must be specified to save this question.
adminInvalidCorrectAnswer: Please select or define a valid correct answer.
adminMissingTextAnswer: Please enter the correct answer text.
loginWelcomeDesc: Learn and practice Khmer Sign Language with AI-powered recognition and real-time feedback, helping bridge the communication gap between Deaf and hearing communities.
loginLearnerSubtitle: Sign in to continue learning Khmer Sign Language with our platform practice and feedback.
loginAdminSubtitle: Sign in to manage courses, quizzes, and learner content.
